name: Contact
description: A contact page with hero, office details, contact form, and frequently asked questions

fields.heading: Get in Touch
fields.subheading: Have a question or want to start a project? We would love to hear from you.

fields.heading: Our Office
fields.body:
Address: 742 Innovation Drive, Suite 400, San Francisco, CA 94107

Email: hello@example.com

Phone: +1 (555) 123-4567

Hours: Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM — 6:00 PM PST

We typically respond to inquiries within one business day. For urgent matters, give us a call during business hours.

fields.heading: Send Us a Message
fields.subheading: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

fields.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
fields.subheading: Answers to the most common questions we receive.

items.question: What is the typical timeline for a new project?
items.answer: Most projects launch within 4 to 8 weeks depending on scope. Simple brochure sites can go live in as little as two weeks, while complex multi-language platforms may take longer. We will provide a detailed timeline during our initial consultation.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: We offer flexible plans based on site traffic and feature requirements. Every plan includes the full block editor, theme engine, and core CMS features. Contact us for a custom quote tailored to your specific needs.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support and maintenance?
items.answer: Yes. All plans include standard support with email and documentation access. We also offer premium support tiers with dedicated account managers, priority response times, and proactive performance monitoring.

items.question: Can I migrate from my existing CMS?
items.answer: Absolutely. We provide migration tools and services for WordPress, Drupal, and other popular platforms. Our team will help you map your existing content structure to VibeCMS nodes and blocks with minimal disruption.

items.question: Is VibeCMS suitable for large, high-traffic sites?
items.answer: VibeCMS is built for performance from the ground up. With sub-50ms TTFB and a single-binary deployment model, it handles high traffic gracefully. Our architecture scales vertically with ease and supports CDN integration for global distribution.
